ddls:
CREATE TABLE "credit_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit history record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "credit_score" REAL /* Credit score of the applicant */,
  "past_defaults" INTEGER /* Number of past defaults */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the credit history was last updated */,
  "credit_score_source" TEXT /* Source of the credit score */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Total credit limit */,
  "credit_utilization" REAL /* Credit utilization ratio */,
  "number_of_active_accounts" INTEGER /* Number of active credit accounts */,
  "number_of_closed_accounts" INTEGER /* Number of closed credit accounts */,
  "number_of_inquiries" INTEGER /* Number of recent credit inquiries */,
  "total_debt" REAL /* Total debt of the applicant */,
  "total_credit" REAL /* Total credit available to the applicant */,
  "number_of_delinquencies" INTEGER /* Number of delinquent accounts */,
  "delinquency_amount" REAL /* Total amount of delinquent accounts */,
  "number_of_public_records" INTEGER /* Number of public records (e.g., bankruptcies) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purpose */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the purpose */,
  "description_detail" TEXT /* Detailed description of the purpose */,
  "risk_category" TEXT /* Risk category associated with the purpose */,
  "average_loan_amount" REAL /* Average loan amount for this purpose */,
  "approval_rate" REAL /* Approval rate for this purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of employment (e.g., employed, unemployed) */,
  "years_employed" INTEGER /* Number of years employed */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the applicant */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company where the applicant is employed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the applicant */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  "last_promotion_date" TEXT /* Date of the last promotion */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Performance rating of the applicant */,
  "employment_history" TEXT /* History of previous employment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personal_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personal status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the personal status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the applicant */,
  "number_of_dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the applicant */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property ownership status */,
  "ownership_status" TEXT /* Ownership status of the property (e.g., owner, renter) */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., House, Apartment) */,
  "property_age" INTEGER /* Age of the property */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Current market value of the property */,
  "property_tax" REAL /* Annual property tax */,
  "property_insurance" REAL /* Annual property insurance cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "installment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each installment plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the installment plan */,
  "duration_months" INTEGER /* Duration in months */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the installment plan */,
  "monthly_payment" REAL /* Monthly payment amount */,
  "total_payment" REAL /* Total payment amount over the term of the plan */,
  "late_payment_fee" REAL /* Fee for late payments */,
  "early_payment_discount" REAL /* Discount for early payments */,
  "prepayment_penalty" REAL /* Penalty for prepayment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of housing (e.g., owner, renter) */,
  "rent_amount" REAL /* Rent amount if applicable */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the housing */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Type of housing (e.g., House, Apartment) */,
  "housing_age" INTEGER /* Age of the housing */,
  "housing_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the housing */,
  "housing_value" REAL /* Market value of the housing */,
  "housing_tax" REAL /* Annual housing tax */,
  "housing_insurance" REAL /* Annual housing insurance cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE applications (
  application_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  applicant_id INTEGER,
  purpose_id INTEGER,
  application_date TEXT,
  FOREIGN KEY (applicant_id) REFERENCES credit_history(applicant_id),
  FOREIGN KEY (purpose_id) REFERENCES purposes(purpose_id)
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each credit history record
Date when the credit history was last updated
Total credit available to the applicant
Risk category associated with the purpose
Average loan amount for this purpose
Unique identifier for each employment status
Name of the company where the applicant is employed
Unique identifier for each personal status
Unique identifier for each property ownership status
Ownership status of the property (e.g., owner, renter)
Current market value of the property
Unique identifier for each installment plan
Interest rate for the installment plan
Total payment amount over the term of the plan
Unique identifier for each housing status
